creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
Results for Solaris-10 x86 (as of 12/25/2008):

1st column = THE compiles
2nd column = THE works

THE-3.2 + PDCurses-3.2:  YES, YES
THE-3.3B + PDCurses-3.2: NO (numerous key.h and command.h errors)

THE-3.2 + PDCurses-3.3:  YES, partial (non-functional graphics cursor)
THE-3.3B + PDCurses-3.3: NO (numerous key.h and command.h errors)

PDCurses-3.4/doc/Makefile: BAD (replace from PDCurses-3.2)

THE-3.2 + PDCurses-3.4:  YES, partial (non-functional graphics cursor)
THE-3.3B + PDCurses-3.4: NO (numerous key.h and command.h errors)

Some minor code fixes required for both THE and PDCurses.
